\tzpentry{ID5813}{Cent Field Strength Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5813 introduces Cent Field Strength Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathbf{F}_{\text{cent}} = -\frac{mv^2}{r}\hat{\mathbf{r}} + q(\mathbf{v} \times \mathbf{B}) + \frac{2G}{c^2r^2}\mathbf{J} \times \mathbf{v} \end{equation}
